Name: Seeed Studio XIAO ESP32C3
Purpose: Main microcontroller module; exact match for PCB footprint RF_Module:MCU_Seeed_ESP32C3
Fit / Notes: Exact ESP32-C3 XIAO footprint used by the finalized PCB. Headers are not included and are not required if the module is soldered directly.

Name: Newhaven 20x4 Character OLED Display
Fit / Notes: Exact schematic part number and exact custom PCB footprint.

Name: 0.96-inch 128x64 I2C OLED Module
Fit / Notes: Exact schematic part number and matching custom PCB footprint. Select the standard module version matching the listed 26 x 26 mm board.

Name: MCP23017 16-bit I2C GPIO Expander, SPDIP-28
Purpose: Expands the available GPIO pins for displays and controls
Fit / Notes: Exact 28-pin SPDIP package required by the PCB. Do not substitute SOIC or SSOP versions.

Name: Alps Alpine EC11E Rotary Encoder with Push Switch
Purpose: Rotary input controls with integrated push buttons
Fit / Notes: 20 mm vertical EC11E body with push switch and matching PCB pin pattern. Exact shaft feel/detent count does not affect PCB fit.

Name: Cherry MX PCB-mount Mechanical Keyswitch
Purpose: Twelve keys in the 3 x 4 switch matrix
Fit / Notes: Cherry MX through-hole keyswitch matching the PCB's Cherry MX 1.00u footprint. Keycaps are not included in the schematic BOM.

Name: 1N4148 Through-hole Switching Diode
Purpose: Prevents ghosting in the key matrix
Fit / Notes: Exact DO-35 axial package required by the PCB's 7.62 mm horizontal footprint.

Name: 100 nF 50 V X7R 0805 Ceramic Capacitor
Fit / Notes: Exact 0805 metric package. 50 V rating is safely above the 3.3 V circuit voltage.
